com.pax.poslink

Class TORResponseInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo

  • public class TORResponseInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Response TOR Information

    “Response TOR Information” is the information returned when a reversal is sent.

    Reversals are sent after a transaction fails due to errors such as a host receive error, “100009 RECEIVE ERROR” or “100003 11-Chip Reject”.This information will return in the next Txx command.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String BatchNo
      Batch number.
      java.lang.String GatewayTransactionID
      The transaction reference number is returned from a gateway directly.
      java.lang.String HostReferenceNumber
      The transaction reference number is returned from a host.
      The host can be a processor(terminal -> gateway -> processor) or another gateway(terminal -> gateway -> another gateway ->…->processor).
      java.lang.String HostResponseCode
      Host/gateway response code
      java.lang.String HostResponseMessage
      Host/gateway response Message
      java.lang.String MaskedPAN
      The Masked PAN of the card.
      java.lang.String OrigAmount
      Original total amount.
      java.lang.String OrigTransAuthCode
      Original transaction auth code.
      java.lang.String OrigTransDateTime
      Original transaction date and time "YYMMDDHHMMSS"
      java.lang.String OrigTransType
      Original Transaction Type, i.e.
      java.lang.String RecordType
      0 – Reversal record
      1 – EMV 2nd GAC Reversal
      java.lang.String ReversalAuthCode
      Reversal authorization code.
      java.lang.String ReversalTimeStamp
      Reversal Transaction timestamp "YYMMDDHHMMSS"

    • Field Detail

      • RecordType

        public java.lang.String RecordType
        0 – Reversal record
        1 – EMV 2nd GAC Reversal

        Attribute: n1

      • ReversalTimeStamp

        public java.lang.String ReversalTimeStamp
        Reversal Transaction timestamp "YYMMDDHHMMSS"

        Attribute: n12

      • HostResponseCode

        public java.lang.String HostResponseCode
        Host/gateway response code

        Attribute: ans...8

      • HostResponseMessage

        public java.lang.String HostResponseMessage
        Host/gateway response Message

        Attribute: ans...255

      • HostReferenceNumber

        public java.lang.String HostReferenceNumber
        The transaction reference number is returned from a host.
        The host can be a processor(terminal -> gateway -> processor) or another gateway(terminal -> gateway -> another gateway ->…->processor).

        Attribute: ans...32

      • GatewayTransactionID

        public java.lang.String GatewayTransactionID
        The transaction reference number is returned from a gateway directly.

        Attribute: ans...32

      • OrigAmount

        public java.lang.String OrigAmount
        Original total amount.

        Attribute: n...9

      • MaskedPAN

        public java.lang.String MaskedPAN
        The Masked PAN of the card. Examples:
        XXXXXX******XXXX
        XXXXXXXX****XXXX

        Attribute: ans…32

        Valid while request transaction is INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV or TOKENADMINISTRATIVE.

      • BatchNo

        public java.lang.String BatchNo
        Batch number.

        Attribute: n...6

      • ReversalAuthCode

        public java.lang.String ReversalAuthCode
        Reversal authorization code.

        Attribute: ans...32

      • OrigTransType

        public java.lang.String OrigTransType
        Original Transaction Type, i.e. Sale, Auth etc….

        Attribute: n2

      • OrigTransDateTime

        public java.lang.String OrigTransDateTime
        Original transaction date and time "YYMMDDHHMMSS"

        Attribute: n12

      • OrigTransAuthCode

        public java.lang.String OrigTransAuthCode
        Original transaction auth code.

        Attribute: ans...32
